name: Trattoria del Corso
address: 28 Via del Corso, 00186 Roma RM, Italy
hours_note: Lunch and dinner service. Wednesday closed.

reviews.author: Elena R.
reviews.text: Cacio e pepe made at the table — properly creamy, not swimming in butter. Book for dinner if you want a terrace table.

reviews.author: James P.
reviews.text: Lunch menu is good value. The amatriciana has real guanciale, not bacon.

reviews.author: Marco B.
reviews.text: House wine by the carafe is honest. Service is brisk at lunch, slower at dinner — as it should be.

items.name: Carbonara
items.description: Egg yolk, guanciale, pecorino — no cream

items.name: Coda alla vaccinara
items.description: Oxtail stew — Thursday special when available

faq.question: Do you take reservations?
faq.answer: Walk-ins welcome at lunch. For dinner terrace tables, call before 6 PM.

faq.question: Is there a lunch menu?
faq.answer: Yes — primi and secondi from the board, weekdays 12–3 PM.

owner_provided_notes: Roman trattoria — pasta at the table, terrace in season.
headline: Roman pasta on Via del Corso
